features: HONEY WITH SUPERPOWERS — MGO 850+: Our best-selling, premium raw Manuka honey — harvested from the remote wilds of New Zealand and naturally rich in 2000+ bioactive compounds. MGO 850+ is crafted for those who take their daily wellness seriously.

SUPER HONEY FOR IMMUNE, DIGESTIVE AND GUT HEALTH SUPPORT: Naturally rich in antibacterial methylglyoxal, antioxidants, and prebiotics, MGO 850+ supports a high-functioning immune system, helps promote healthy gut microbiome balance, supports comfortable digestion, and contributes to whole-body vitality.

FULLY TRACEABLE FROM HIVE TO HAND: Every jar carries a unique QR code — scan to trace your honey to its exact New Zealand origin, meet the beekeeper who cared for it, and access your independently verified MGO purity report. The most transparent honey on the market.

SMOOTH, CREAMY, AND DEEPLY RICH: A thick, velvety honey with deep caramel and subtle floral complexity — best enjoyed straight from the spoon as your daily ritual. Also beautiful stirred into warm tea, drizzled over yogurt, or blended into smoothies. One spoonful. Every day. Backed by dedicated 1:1 support from our New Zealand team.

ETHICALLY SOURCED, B-CORP CERTIFIED: Born from the Art of Ethical Beekeeping — small-batch harvested with deep care for our bees and New Zealand's native wild ecosystems. Non-GMO, Glyphosate Residue Free, and B-Corp Certified. A honey you can feel good about, inside and out.
parentTitle: Manukora UMF 20+/MGO 850+ Raw Manuka Honey - Authentic Non-GMO New Zealand Honey, UMF & MGO Certified, Traceable from Hive to Hand
title: Manukora Raw Manuka Honey MGO 850+, New Zealand Honey, Superfood, 2000+ Natural Compounds, Non-GMO, Monofloral, 3rd-Party Tested, Glyphosate Residue Free, Traceable Hive-to-Hand, Immune and Digestive Support, 500g
